title: sarothamnus albus
intro: Sarothamnus albus, also known as the white broom or broom sparathrope, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, the plant's medicinal properties lie in its ability to act as a vasodilator, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits of Sarothamnus albus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant are commonly made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support heart health and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia.
